case_title: DAVID KOSECOFF VS. WEALTHFRONT ADVISORS LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-10-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-10-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF DAVID KOSECOFF IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WEALTHFRONT ADVISORS LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JONATHAN MATTHEWS (CHIEF COMPLIANCE OFFICER). DEFENDANT WEALTHFRONT BROKERAGE LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JONATHAN MATTHEWS (CHIEF COMPLIANCE OFFICER). PLAINTIFFS/DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $138.60) SERVED NOV-15-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WEALTHFRONT ADVISORS LLC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-10-2021 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KOSECOFF, DAVID IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WEALTHFRONT ADVISORS LLC WEALTHFRONT BROKERAGE LLC STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
